amendment.description: To amend the definition of Trusted Traveler Program.

vote.text: Amendment SA 4707 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 4707 proposed by Senator Cornyn. (consideration: CR S1355-1356) To amend the definition of Trusted Traveler Program.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 4707 proposed by Senator Cornyn.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 4707 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
